headline: NetApp Enhances Support for AI Workloads at Massive Scale
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., June 23, 2026--NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, today announced the release of StorageGRID 12.1, designed to help customers scale AI and other modern workloads with a federated global namespace. The new capabilities improve how data is accessed, processed, and managed across distributed environments to support AI data pipelines, data lakes, and modern object-based applications.

headline: NetApp (NTAP) Launches StorageGRID 12.1 And Expands CGI Hybrid Cloud Partnership
summary: NetApp (NasdaqGS:NTAP) has released StorageGRID 12.1, introducing features aimed at AI and modern data workloads. The update brings federated global namespaces and higher throughput to support large scale, distributed AI operations. NetApp also expanded its global alliance with CGI to deliver intelligent data infrastructure across hybrid cloud environments. NetApp operates at the intersection of data storage, AI and cloud infrastructure, where enterprises are reworking how they handle...

headline: NetApp (NTAP) Stock After 48% Year-To-Date Rally Is There Still Upside?
summary: If you are wondering whether NetApp stock is still attractively priced after its recent run, this article focuses squarely on what the current market price might be implying about value. NetApp closed at US$157.82, with the share price down 2.1% over the last week, up 13.2% over the last month, up 48.2% year to date, and up 51.6% over the past year. These moves have come alongside ongoing attention on NetApp's role in data storage and cloud-related infrastructure, as investors weigh how the...
